description: Context Fabric for migrating eShop WebForms application to Python + React

project_facts.description: Application overview, technology stack, delivery surfaces

manifest.description: Complete source file inventory and module listing

database_schema.description: Table structures, foreign keys, and relationships

evidence_primitives.description: Delivery surfaces, data access patterns, transaction scopes

data_ownership.description: Table write/read patterns and ownership analysis

seam_candidates.description: Candidate seam definitions with evaluation criteria

seam_scores.description: Scoring and ranking of seam candidates

seam_proposals.description: Final seam definitions ready for migration

catalog_management.description: Detailed specification for catalog management seam

key_findings: Application is small and cohesive - single seam optimal
Clean layered architecture with no circular dependencies
All external integrations have abstractions (IImageService, ICatalogService)
Database uses HiLo pattern for ID generation - needs replacement
Authentication is optional (Azure AD) - easy to replace with JWT
Image upload service lacks authentication - security concern to address
next_steps: Set up modern development environment (Python + React)
Generate OpenAPI specification from legacy endpoints
Build React frontend with TanStack Query
Deploy and verify parity with legacy system
